meaning: n.壁架,架状突出物,暗礁,矿层
examples: She put the vase of flowers on the window ledge.
Dorothy had climbed onto the ledge outside his window.
He cupped his hands and gave her a boost up to the ledge.
Note the brass cigar holders for Parliamentary deputies on the window-ledge, from a more tobacco-friendly age.
Fashion is clothing that evolves, and sometimes climbs out on a ledge (and sometimes jumps off).
